name: 接入渠道
description: 管理聊天频道账户（WhatsApp/Telegram/Discord/Slack 等）

commands.name: channels
commands.description: 管理聊天频道账户，支持 WhatsApp、Telegram、Discord、Google Chat、Slack、Mattermost、Signal、iMessage、MS Teams
commands.descriptionEn: Manage chat channel accounts for WhatsApp, Telegram, Discord, Google Chat, Slack, Mattermost, Signal, iMessage, and MS Teams

options.description: 频道账户 ID (默认 default)

examples.code: openclaw channels add --channel telegram --account alerts --name "Alerts Bot" --token $TELEGRAM_BOT_TOKEN
openclaw channels add --channel discord --account work --name "Work Bot" --token $DISCORD_BOT_TOKEN

subcommands.name: list
subcommands.description: 显示已配置的频道和认证配置，支持 --json 和 --no-usage
subcommands.descriptionEn: Show configured channels and auth profiles, supports --json and --no-usage

subcommands.name: status
subcommands.description: 检查 Gateway 可达性和频道健康状态，--probe 运行额外检查
subcommands.descriptionEn: Check Gateway reachability and channel health, --probe runs extra checks

subcommands.name: logs
subcommands.description: 显示最近的频道日志，支持 --lines、--channel、--json

subcommands.name: add
subcommands.description: 向导式添加频道，传入 flag 则切换为非交互模式
subcommands.descriptionEn: Wizard-style channel setup; flags switch to non-interactive mode

subcommands.name: remove
subcommands.description: 默认禁用频道，传 --delete 删除配置条目
subcommands.descriptionEn: Disable by default; pass --delete to remove config entries

subcommands.name: login
subcommands.description: 交互式频道登录（仅 WhatsApp Web）
